hero_description: Swap CAPTCHA providers without changing your code. Works with React, Solid, Vue, Svelte, Qwik, and Lit.
frameworks_description: Choose your favorite framework. Same API, same features, zero compromises.
features_description: Everything you need to integrate CAPTCHA seamlessly into your application
feature_unified_api_description: One consistent interface across all CAPTCHA providers. Swap providers without changing your code.
feature_smart_loading_description: Vendor scripts load only when needed. Better performance and smaller bundle sizes.
feature_auto_theme_description: Automatically adapts to your app's theme, even when providers don't support it natively.
feature_type_safe_description: Full TypeScript support with zero extra dependencies. Lightweight and fast.
feature_programmatic_control_description: Execute, reset, and manage CAPTCHA widgets programmatically with a simple handle API.
feature_framework_agnostic_description: Works with React, Solid, Vue, Svelte, Qwik, and Lit. Same features everywhere.
cta_description: Choose your framework and start protecting your forms in minutes.
